# Images Directory

## Current Images
- `Black_Logo.webp` - Main logo (optimized WebP format)
- `chair-2.png` - Hero section image
- `chair.png` - Alternative hero image
- `banner.png` - Large banner image
- `banner-1.png` - Alternative banner

## Image Optimization
- Use WebP format for better compression
- Keep filenames in kebab-case
- Store all static images in `/public` directory
- Use absolute paths starting with `/`

## Future Improvements
- Convert remaining PNGs to WebP
- Implement lazy loading
- Add responsive image sizes
- Use Sanity CDN for dynamic content
